{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Stargarden
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Stargarden]] is being besieged by the [[Silent King]]'s drones.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
